Container.Name: SoundScout
Container.Overview: SoundScout is a self-hosted music discovery and acquisition app for Plex. It uses Last.fm listening history to build personalised recommendations, lets users import Spotify playlists and albums, downloads missing music into your library, and keeps Plex playlists in sync from a Web UI. Plex users can sign in individually, link their own Last.fm accounts, set per-user discovery schedules, and monitor artists so new releases are downloaded automatically.
Container.Description: Automated Last.fm discovery, Spotify import, and music downloads for Plex.

Config.Name: Music Library
Config.Description: Path to your music library — downloaded tracks are saved here

Config.Name: App Config
Config.Description: Persistent config — stores Plex tokens, per-user settings, session data

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent data — download backlog and discovery reports

Config.Name: Scraper Config
Config.Description: Folder containing config.json with Tidal/Qobuz credentials (required for downloads)

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the SoundScout web interface

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for Auto Discovery schedules (e.g. America/New_York, Europe/London)

Config.Name: Plex URL
Config.Description: URL of your Plex server, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:32400

Config.Name: Plex Music Library
Config.Description: Name of your Plex music library section

Config.Name: Session Secret Key
Config.Description: A long random string — keeps user sessions valid across container restarts. Generate one with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Public URL
Config.Description: Public URL of this container, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:5000 — required for Plex OAuth sign-in to work

Config.Name: Require Plex Login
Config.Description: Set to 1 to require Plex sign-in to use the Web UI (recommended)
